# GitHub Repository Configuration

Use these values when configuring the repository on GitHub (Settings → General, or the About section).

## Repository Description

**Short**

```
Role-based Team Skills platform with an ECC-style harness skeleton for commands, specialists, rules, and workflow automation.
```

**Long**

```
Team Skills Platform is a company-grade workflow plugin that combines role-based delivery, ECC-style specialist agents, layered rules, curated skills, hooks skeleton, contexts, examples, and dual Codex/Claude distribution.
```

## GitHub Topics

```
agent-workflows
codex
claude
skills
plugin
developer-tools
workflow-automation
frontend-governance
platform-engineering
```

## Elevator Pitch

> Team Skills Platform turns one-off prompting into a reusable role-based workflow system, then adds an ECC-style harness skeleton for specialist agents, commands, rules, and extensibility.
